title: Xtra Crispy American Chicken Burger
description: A spicy cheese-pull weeknight American dish featuring cider vinegar, this sugar-free-friendly burger is perfect for a quick dinner
instructions: Pound the chicken breast to 1/2 inch thickness and season with salt, black pepper, and hot sauce
Dredge the chicken in flour, shaking off excess
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat to 350 degrees
Fry the chicken for 5-6 minutes on each side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165 degrees
Transfer the chicken to a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil
In a small bowl, whisk together the cider vinegar and 1 tablespoon of water
Brush the vinegar mixture onto the fried chicken
Assemble the burgers by placing a chicken breast on each bun, topping with a cheese slice, and adding a lettuce leaf
Place the burgers under the broiler for 1-2 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly
